long story short: it is very possible I may be developing BPD or smth similar, my psych is not quite sure but atleast the BPD treatment medication is helping, issue is, it hit near after some relationship issues (very complex situation) so now every so often my heart just annoys me of like, impossible loneliness, like, I could have a partner and it would still feel that way
A number people get mad about
Its just the new 69 or gottem
some might even say its the new "you lost the game" even
oh- i genuinely have no idea how to comfort you dear but i hope it gets better, we're always here!!
It's like that but for younger people
I appreciate the sentiment but if anything I would recommend not saying that to people you barely know
they might take it seriously and then you are mixed with a person who is very high burden
so? as long as we're friends i dont mind listening
I mean, making friends on the internet is kinda normal
yeah thats not the interesting part
enlighten me? please? my heart is doing backflips rn because idk what it means and thats not good for my health dear
do you want the entire explanation or just the good parts of the explanation
hello rosi sweetheart, give us a moment but welcome to the server

so like, by saying you don't mind as long as you are friends you are implying you see me as friend enough to hear me out, with the few time we have met eachother and what I just shared that implies you are either:
very compassionate and somehow never tired of hearing people talk
or
an idiot who hasn't experienced someone that is a heavy burden to listen to and cannot imagine themselves getting tired of them
i definitely have heard my fair share of trauma and experienced my own, we're all only human after all dear
main chat is insane with saya release
Just people complaining as per usual
that's good sweetheart, newer player or new to server?
I don't know if I should speak my mind but I think it better to be compassionate to some than it is to be dismissive of them, even if being dismissive would be easier.
but you also have to be realistic with what you offer and you can take in
Though I have heard a fair bit about the game
in some alternate universe I love him cuz I love gambling and smuggy assholes
idk why he just doesn't hit with me
Of course, you can't shoulder everything without damaging yourself, it's like a balancing act, I guess.
My morals don't allow me to be dismissive and it's often a pain in the ass
and thats the kind of peoplee who often offer hearing and then take more than they can take...
ultimately I think you can be both, hearing them out in a somewhat casual way, as long as you don't say things like "I can always hear you out" or other similar things you should be okay
Eh, I got bigger problems on my plate so I can listen to people if they need me to
it is a risky game either way as unstable people can easily get attached to anyone that hears them out though
in my case im fine and good with listening im just not always able to give input, to which i already said i didnt know what to say so i just offered to listen and possibly help
Oh yeah, that's over reaching if you don't really know the person
yeah I did begin saying this cuz panda said it, heheh
i see! how are you enjoying everything
though I really do appreciate it
well if you ever wish to take me up on the offer im here
yeah I will keep it in mind
It's fun! I quite enjoy the gameplay, and the art is really pretty too.

embeds.title: The Gay Science
embeds.description: The Gay Science (German: Die fröhliche Wissenschaft; sometimes translated as The Joyful Wisdom or The Joyous Science) is a book by Friedrich Nietzsche published in 1882, and was followed by a second edition in 1887, after the completion of Thus Spoke Zarathustra and Beyond Good and Evil.
